product.name: 3W 395NM LED Black Light, Flexible Gooseneck UV Blacklight for Satin Detection, Lamp for Blacklight Poster, Blacklight Party, Ultraviolet Curing Lamp for Fluorescent Paint
features: GREAT BLACK LIGHT FOR ARTWORK:This Flexible Little Black Light is pretty handy for working on art with fluroescent and phosphorescent pigments.
SMALL BUT POWERFUL UV LED:3W 395NM high power LED UV Blacklight, brings flicker-free UV light, high brightness. It's designed for blacklight parties, black light art, restaurant signage.
COMPACT AND FLEXIBLE: 10" Flexible gooseneck arm UV Black Fixture, you can set the light to anywhere you want to get the perfect blacklight lamp lighting, showing your arts or signs more fessional.
SIMPLE AND PORTABLE DESIGNED:54" USB power cord with ON/OFF Switch, 120V US Power Adapter Included. You can use this blacklight fixture with a power bank or computer.
APPLICATION:The Ultra violet blacklights are widly used for blackight poster, glow party, black paints, fluorescent paints, resin arts, ultraviolet curing, sain detection and apres gel X system
